name: UiBase.Alerts

values.name: alert
values.comment: Display an alert, inline on the page

name: UiBase.Buttons

values.name: actionButton
values.comment: Largest button that indicates you can do something

values.name: mediumActionButton
values.comment: Medium button that indicates you can do something

values.name: pageSelectButton
values.comment: Button for right hand top menu that selects a page

values.name: smallActionButton
values.comment: Smallest button that indicates you can do something

name: UiBase.Colors
comment:
Predefine some colors by role. Uses phollyer/elm-ui-colors, which I recommend for
named colors.


# Colours by role

@docs navBackground, navTextColour

name: UiBase.OnKey

values.name: onEnter
values.comment: Send msg when Enter key is pressed

values.name: onEscape
values.comment: Send msg when Escape key is pressed

values.name: onKey
values.comment:
Send msg when keyValue key is pressed. Keyvalue must be a string that is the value of a particular key

        onKey "Enter" msg

        onKey "Q" msg

name: UiBase.Product

aliases.name: Product
aliases.type: { id : Basics.Int, source : String.String, manufacturer : String.String, product_code : String.String, description : String.String, scale : String.String, category : String.String, url : String.String, image_url : Maybe.Maybe String.String, price : String.String, display_short_description : Basics.Bool, indexed : Basics.Bool, first_seen : Date.Date }

aliases.name: SortDescription
aliases.comment: Details of what column is currently sorted, and how to sort it
aliases.type: { columnName : String.String, accessor : UiBase.Product.Product -> String.String, direction : UiBase.Product.SortDirection }

values.name: sortDirection
values.comment: Given a column name and the current sort description, determine the appropriate sort direction

values.name: toggleSort
values.comment: Given a column name to sort on and the current sort description, determine the new sort description
